Manually clears bits from the internal EventGroup.
Retrieves the Confirmed uplink retries limit.
Executes the recovery protocol. First Soft-Reset (ATZ), then Hard-Reset if there is a pin.

Sends any AT command to the module, returning error if it fails. Internally uses the LsmAtParser logi...

Retrieves the Unconfirmed uplink repetitions count.

Sends a command and extracts a value from the response.
Performs a hardware reset using the reset pin.
Attempts to recover a lost connection (re-executes OTAA Join if dropped).

Manually overrides the internal joined state tracker.
Performs a software reset (ATZ Command).

Sends a simple command and waits for OK/ERROR. Example: sendCommand("AT+JOIN");.
Sends data through UART.
Enables or disables Adaptive Data Rate (ADR).
Sets the LoRaWAN operational frequency band.
Configures the number of retries for Confirmed uplinks.
Sets the Data Rate (DR) of the module.
Sets the LoRaWAN Device Address (DevAddr) for ABP mode.
Sets the LoRaWAN Device EUI (DevEUI).
Enables or disables the Duty Cycle limitation (EU regions mostly).
Sets the delay for the Join1 receive window.
Sets the delay for the Join2 receive window.
Sets the LoRaWAN Network ID (NetID).
Sets the delay for the RX1 receive window.
Sets the Data Rate (DR) specifically for the RX2 window.
Sets the delay for the RX2 receive window.
Sets the precise frequency for the RX2 window.
Sets the transmission power index.
Configures the number of repetitions for Unconfirmed uplinks.
